summary: SaveSyncCursor writes last_synced_at as RFC3339 (UTC), matching SaveSyncState, instead of SQLite CURRENT_TIMESTAMP.
reason: The generated store wrote last_synced_at in two formats: SaveSyncState used time.RFC3339 (T-separated, Z suffix) while SaveSyncCursor used CURRENT_TIMESTAMP (space-separated, no suffix). Because movers/designers-deltas key design_snapshots on GetLastSyncedAt and order by sync_at string DESC, the mixed formats could reverse current/previous (since 'T' > ' '), making all deltas negative and silently returning empty. This is a generator store-template inconsistency.
